content.json:
# SpyCloud Remediation Dashboard
**Automated Response Tracking** - Monitor MDE device isolation actions and Conditional Access enforcement triggered by SpyCloud intelligence.

> This workbook focuses on Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL and SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL for tracking automated remediation actions.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query:
union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | distinct status_s),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | distinct status_s)
| distinct status_s
| order by status_s asc
parameters.label: Action Status

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["MDE Isolations", 0, 1, "CA Actions", 0, 2, "MDE Success Rate %", 0, 3, "CA Success Rate %", 0, 4, "Unique Devices Acted On", 0, 5]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="MDE Isolations", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="CA Actions", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize total=count(), success=countif(status_s in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed")) | extend Label="MDE Success Rate %", Order=3, Value=iff(total > 0, (success * 100) / total, 0) | project Label, Value=toint(Value), Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize total=count(), success=countif(status_s in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed")) | extend Label="CA Success Rate %", Order=4, Value=iff(total > 0, (success * 100) / total, 0) | project Label, Value=toint(Value), Order),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(device_name_s) | extend Label="Unique Devices Acted On", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Remediation Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="MDE Isolation"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Actions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="Conditional Access")
| project TimeGenerated, Actions, Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Remediation Actions Over Time (Daily)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="MDE-Isolation", Target=device_name_s, Action=action_type_s, Status=status_s),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="CA-Remediation", Target=user_principal_name_s, Action=action_s, Status=status_s)
| extend StatusIndicator = case(Status in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed"), "SUCCESS", Status in ("Failed", "Error"), "FAILED", "PENDING")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
| project TimeGenerated, Playbook, Target, Action, StatusIndicator)
content.title: Recent Remediation Actions

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend StatusCategory = case(status_s in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed"), "Success", status_s in ("Failed", "Error"), "Failed", "Pending") | summarize Count=count() by StatusCategory | extend Source="MDE"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend StatusCategory = case(status_s in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed"), "Success", status_s in ("Failed", "Error"), "Failed", "Pending") | summarize Count=count() by StatusCategory | extend Source="CA")
| project Source, StatusCategory, Count)
content.title: Remediation Outcome by Source

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and status_s in ("Failed", "Error")
| project TimeGenerated, Playbook="MDE-Isolation", Target=device_name_s, Action=action_type_s, Status=status_s, ErrorDetails=error_message_s
| union (
    SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and status_s in ("Failed", "Error")
    | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="CA-Remediation", Target=user_principal_name_s, Action=action_s, Status=status_s, ErrorDetails=error_message_s
)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Failed Remediation Actions (Requires Attention)
